channel.title: Cristiano's Daily Briefing
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news digest across technology, media, finance, and executive leadership.
channel.itunes:author: Cristiano Meda

item.title: Daily Briefing — Wednesday, April 22 2026
item.description: Google drops $750M on agentic AI at Cloud Next as the governance-first enterprise playbook becomes the defining competitive divide of 2026
